name: acquire --explain tells the operator the acquired rules are project-scoped and not official until a promotion PR
command: ID=L561E03; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id s --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z --explain 2>&1 | grep -qE 'EXPLAIN:.*NOT official.*promotion pull request'; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID && echo acquire-explains-nonofficial 1>&2
